Meaning.En: to go or come back to a place, person, or condition
Meaning.Example: She will return to her hometown next month.

Situation.Vi: Di chuyển trở lại nơi đã từng ở hoặc từng đến.
Situation.En: Moving back to a place one previously lived in or visited.

Meaning.Vi: sự trở về, vé khứ hồi
Meaning.En: the act of going back; also, a ticket for a journey that includes both going to and returning from a destination
Meaning.Example: We booked a round-trip ticket with a return flight in two weeks.

Situation.Vi: Trong đặt vé máy bay, chỉ hành trình đi và về.
Situation.En: In flight booking, refers to a journey that includes both outbound and inbound legs.

Meaning.En: to give something back to its owner or original place
Meaning.Example: Please return the book to the library by Friday.

Situation.Vi: Khi không còn cần dùng, đưa vật lại cho người cho mượn hoặc nơi gốc.
Situation.En: Giving an item back to its lender or original location when no longer needed.

Meaning.Vi: lợi nhuận, kết quả thu được
Meaning.En: profit or gain, especially from an investment or business activity
Meaning.Example: The stock offered a high return on investment.

Situation.Vi: Trong đầu tư, chỉ lợi nhuận đạt được từ vốn bỏ ra.
Situation.En: In finance, refers to the profit earned from an investment relative to its cost.

Meaning.En: the act of sending goods back to a seller, often for a refund or exchange
Meaning.Example: The store has a 30-day return policy for unworn clothing.

Situation.Vi: Khi mua hàng không ưng ý, mang hàng trả lại cửa hàng.
Situation.En: When a customer brings purchased items back to the store, usually for refund or replacement.
